title: vriesea citrina
intro: Vriesea citrina, also known as the yellow air plant, is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and epiphytic growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vriesea citrina include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Vriesea citrina, typically in the form of infusions or tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
